# Semantic Conventions for GenAI Skill

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

<!-- toc -->

- [Skill Span](#skill-span)
- [Skill Metric](#skill-metric)

<!-- tocstop -->

## Skill Span

GenAI skill represents a reusable, self-contained capability that can be invoked by agents or workflows. Skills encapsulate specific functionalities such as code review, data analysis, or task execution.

<!-- semconv span.gen_ai.invoke_skill.client -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- /semconv -->

### Span name

**Span name** SHOULD be `invoke_skill {gen_ai.skill.name}` if `gen_ai.skill.name` is readily available.
When `gen_ai.skill.name` is not available, it SHOULD be `invoke_skill`.

### Attributes

| Attribute | Type | Description | Requirement Level |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `gen_ai.provider.name` | string | The Generative AI provider name | Required |
| `gen_ai.operation.name` | string | The name of the operation (`invoke_skill`) | Required |
| `server.address` | string | GenAI server address | Recommended |
| `server.port` | int | GenAI server port | Conditionally Required: if `server.address` is set |
| `gen_ai.skill.id` | string | The unique identifier of the GenAI skill | Conditionally Required: if applicable |
| `gen_ai.skill.name` | string | The name of the GenAI skill being invoked | Conditionally Required: when available |
| `gen_ai.skill.version` | string | The version of the GenAI skill | Recommended |
| `gen_ai.skill.description` | string | Free-form description of the GenAI skill | Recommended |
| `gen_ai.input.messages` | string | Input messages passed to the skill | Opt-in |
| `gen_ai.output.messages` | string | Output messages from the skill | Opt-in |
| `error.type` | string | Error type if the operation ended in an error | Conditionally Required: if error |

## Skill Metric

### Metric: `gen_ai.skill.duration`

This metric represents the duration of GenAI skill executions.

| Name | Instrument Type | Unit |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gen_ai.skill.duration` | Histogram | ms |

| Attribute | Requirement Level |
| --- | --- |
| `gen_ai.provider.name` | Required |
| `gen_ai.operation.name` | Required |
| `gen_ai.skill.name` | Required |
| `gen_ai.request.model` | Conditionally Required: if available |
| `gen_ai.response.model` | Recommended |
| `server.address` | Recommended |
| `server.port` | Conditionally Required: if `server.address` is set |
| `error.type` | Conditionally Required: if error |

[DocumentStatus]: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/v1.37.0/specification/document-status.md
